text.title: Meta Ads Creative Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-meta-creative engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: First 2 sec is brand logo and music intro; thumb-stop rate <8%.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated Meta ad like a TV spot.
antipattern.fix: Move logo to seconds 5+; lead with pattern-interrupt or problem statement in seconds 0-3.

antipattern.symptom: 16:9 landscape ad uploaded; mobile feed crops 40%; CPM 30% above benchmark.
antipattern.root-cause: Asset library only has landscape video.
antipattern.fix: Re-render at 4:5 or 9:16; safe-zone the on-screen text for both.

antipattern.symptom: One creative per ad set; CTR drops 60% by day 7; CPA doubles.
antipattern.fix: Ship minimum 3 variants per ad set; rotate the bottom performer weekly.
